blocked_family_requests.blocker: requires pair-frame scorer-geometry lattice binding before full-board pair/frame drops are queue-executable
requires receiver/materializer support for non-pair-drop mask semantics
requires inverse-scorer action cell to runtime materializer binding

pairset_acquisition_profile.starting_point_policy: expand from near-frontier drop-two rows into bounded drop-many local probes before exact-axis authority

planner_hints.rationale: drop-two local CPU drift rows are close enough to the frontier to guide acquisition, but too conservative to treat as the optimization endpoint
